---
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false

execute:
  cache: false
  echo: false
  warnings: false
  error: false
---

```{r}
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
source("../../_common.R")
status(type = "drafting")
```


## Overview {.unnumbered}

This chapter provides an overview of the current trends in ...

---

## Key Findings {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-tip}
- **Point 1:** short summary here.
- **Point 2:** short summary here.
- **Point 3:** short summary here.
- **Point 4:** short summary here.
:::

---

## What to Expect in This Chapter {.unnumbered}

- **Section 1:** Subheadline 1
- **Section 2:** Subheadline 2
- **Section 3:** Subheadline 3
